ideation: This animation sequence expresses affection and care, mirroring the feeling evoked by the green heart emoji.  The robot will use both arms in a gesture that gently cradles something precious. The movement starts with arms slightly raised and angled inward, then moves to a gentle embrace before returning to a relaxed position.  The use of both arms suggests a warm, encompassing feeling, appropriate for the emoji. Frame 1 shows arms raised slightly towards the chest, palms facing each other. Frame 2 shows the arms moving inward to embrace an invisible object. Frame 3 shows the arms slightly lower, gently holding the invisible object. Frame 4 returns the arms to a relaxed neutral position.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly, palms facing inward
arms move closer, beginning a gentle embrace
cradling the heart with soft, inward pressure
